pages.title: Recycler
pages.text: The $(l)Recycler$() is a machine that converts physical items back into $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$(). It allows you to reclaim computational value from items you no longer need, provided you have already $(l:logicore:machines/reserach_station)researched$() them.

pages.title: Operation
pages.text: The Recycler requires $(l)FE$() (Forge Energy) to operate. When provided with power and an item that has a known $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycle Value$(), it will break down the item and generate Cycles.$(br)$(br)Only items that have been fully researched can be recycled by this machine.

pages.title: Cycle Distribution
pages.text: By default, generated Cycles are stored in the Recycler's internal buffer and can be distributed to the network via $(l:logicore:components/data_cable)Data Cables$().$(br)$(br)If a $(l:logicore:machines/cloud_interface)Cloud Interface$() is connected (with its back to the Recycler), it will automatically upload the Cycles directly to your cloud storage.
